chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1355 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 15-09-2025 None present for the petitioners. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. **** None present for the petitioners; no intimation is received so far. This petition was filed in the year 2019 and lastly it was fixed in Court on 28.01.2021. Thereafter, no steps have been taken by the petitioners to have the matter fixed in Court, which reflects that either the petitioners have lost their interest in proceeding with this matter or the purpose for which instant petition was filed, has been achieved. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
